title: rubus cimbricus microgene schwenckfeldii
side_effects: Rubus cimbricus microgene schwenckfeldii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation, itching, and anaphylaxis in severe cases. In some instances, long-term use may lead to liver and kidney damage, while excessive consumption can cause dizziness, headaches, and fatigue. Additionally, improper preparation or dosing of the plant may result in an imbalance of certain nutrients, leading to muscle weakness, joint pain, and other systemic problems. It's essential to consult a healthcare professional for proper guidance and precautions when using Rubus cimbricus microgene schwenckfeldii for health purposes.
